subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of Eternity, Who through His Most Great Name hath transformed separation into reunion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک قدم را که باسم اعظم فراق را بلقا تبدیل نمود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement
